{{Quote|Oooh, big, scary Jedi! What—you're too much of a gullipud to take one alive?|[[Cade Skywalker]] to [[Jariah Syn]]|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 2">[[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]]</ref>}}
'''Gullipuds''' were bulky, loose-skinned, self-inflating amphibians native to the [[Gungan Swamp|swamps]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. As they were small and easy prey for other animals, like [[Pikobi/Legends|pikobis]], gullipuds would extend their spine to make themselves harder to catch and swallow. When inflated, gullipuds actually bounced. Because of this, they were used in [[Gulliball/Legends|gullipud ball]] games by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]].

{{Creature-stub}}
